body:
Define a shared Agent abstract base class and tool registry pattern. Currently market-intelligence uses Anthropic SDK directly while assistant/base.py uses Gemini with a different pattern.

**Scope:**
- Define `Agent` ABC with `process()`, `health_check()`, `agent_id` (match JIE pattern)
- Unified tool registry (register tools once, any agent can use them)
- LLM adapter layer that abstracts Anthropic vs Gemini vs Azure OpenAI
- Split monolith files: consulting_api.py (974 LOC), base.py (439 LOC)

**Current state:** 2 different LLM SDKs, no shared abstraction, inconsistent tool handling.
title: refactor: unified Agent ABC + tool registry
